rationale: tuning_curve_rmse is computed against the t0004 target tuning curve. For this task only distal sec.L changes; stimulus biophysics is otherwise unchanged (AR(2) rho=0.6, V_rest=-60 mV). Target-fit RMSE is not informative for a length sweep on the t0024 testbed, so we report DSI / HWHM / reliability but omit RMSE.
